prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年该科类最低位次分别为：2021 年约 29679 名、2022 年约 32564 名、2023 年因断档骤降至 62012 名、2024 年回升至 36041 名、2025 年约 39448 名。排除 2023 年断档异常值后，近两年呈持续后移趋势，2024→2025 年后移约 3407 名，竞争明显加剧；该校在安徽省该科类招生计划：2021–2023 年均为 138 人，2024 年 139 人，2025 年 141 人，2026 年增至 145 人，较 2025 年扩招约 2.84%。扩招幅度较小，对位次缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川农业大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名 2026 年约第 134 名，近年排名在 130–160 之间波动，整体处于中后段 211 水平；2023 年高考周期声誉评价偏正面（食堂服务好、宿舍有自习室）；2022 年中性/混合（投档线逐年下降趋势+正面回应舆情）；抖音热度总排名第 86 位，评价"一般"，综合热度约 22.5 万，短视频曝光量处于中等偏低水平，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中，畜牧学获评 A、作物学获评 A-，为该校核心优势学科；招生专业中动物医学、动物科学、农学等与优势学科直接对应，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、 电气工程及其自动化等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校以农林特色为主，热门专业招生人数有限；安徽省 2026 年普通高考总人数约 45.1 万，按近年物理类占比约 69.4% 估算，物理类考生约 31.3 万人，较 2025 年 32.1 万人略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓和；四川农业大学位于四川省成都市/雅安市，对安徽省考生属于跨省就读，地域偏好一般；该校在安徽招生人数占比较小（约 1.5%–2.8%），属非主力生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024→2025 年位次后移约 3407 名的竞争加剧趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招 2.84% 的缓解作用有限、以及安徽省物理类考生总数略有减少等因素，考虑竞争加剧趋势略强于扩招缓解效应，预测 2026 年最低录取位次约 39919 名，较 2025 年 39448 名后移约 471 名；位次区间 39419–40419 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约 39919 名，区间 39419–40419 名。位次在区间下限（39419 名）以内可重点冲刺一档热门专业（计算机、电气、电子类）；位次在区间中段（约 39919 名）建议以二档优势学科专业（动物医学、会计学、农学、动物科学）为主，兼顾一档冲刺；位次接近区间上限（40419 名）建议以三档专业保底，优先选择土木工程、环境科学等。该校农林特色鲜明，畜牧学 A、作物学 A- 为优势学科，相关专业性价比较高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were: approximately 29679 in 2021, 32564 in 2022, a sharp drop to 62012 in 2023 due to a gap, a recovery to 36041 in 2024, and about 39448 in 2025. Excluding the abnormal 2023 gap, the rankings have shown a continuous backward trend in recent two years, moving back by about 3407 from 2024 to 2025, indicating intensified competition; the university's enrollment plan for this category in Anhui Province: 138 students each year from 2021 to 2023, 139 in 2024, 141 in 2025, and increasing to 145 in 2026, an expansion of about 2.84% compared to 2025. The expansion is relatively small, with limited effect on alleviating ranking pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking is approximately 134th in 2026, fluctuating between 130 and 160 in recent years, overall at the mid-to-late level of 211 universities; during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was relatively positive (good cafeteria service, dormitories with study rooms); in 2022, it was neutral/mixed (declining admission score trend + positive response to public opinion); Douyin heat ranking is 86th overall, with an evaluation of 'average', comprehensive heat about 225,000, short video exposure at a moderately low level, no significant signs of increased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Animal Science received an A, Crop Science received an A-, which are the university's core advantageous disciplines; among the enrollment majors, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, Agronomy, etc., directly correspond to the advantageous disciplines, attracting some candidates interested in related fields.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social heat, but this university mainly focuses on agriculture and forestry, with limited enrollment numbers for popular majors; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Anhui Province general college entrance examination is about 451,000, with an estimated Physics Category proportion of about 69.4% in recent years, resulting in about 313,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight decrease from 321,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure; Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu/Ya'an, Sichuan Province, which is an inter-provincial study for Anhui candidates, with generally average regional preference; the university's enrollment proportion in Anhui is relatively small (about 1.5%–2.8%), making it a non-primary source province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the intensified competition trend with a ranking backward shift of about 3407 from 2024 to 2025, the limited alleviation effect of a small enrollment expansion of 2.84% in 2026, and the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category candidates in Anhui Province, the intensified competition trend is slightly stronger than the expansion alleviation effect. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will be about 39919, moving back by about 471 from 39448 in 2025; the ranking range is 39419–40419.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 39919, with a range of 39419–40419. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit (39419) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors (Computer, Electrical, Electronic); those with rankings in the middle of the range (about 39919) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 advantageous discipline majors (Veterinary Medicine, Accounting, Agronomy, Animal Science), while also considering Tier 1 sprinting; candidates with rankings near the upper limit (40419) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net, prioritizing Civil Engineering, Environmental Science, etc. The university has distinct agricultural and forestry characteristics, with Animal Science (A) and Crop Science (A-) as advantageous disciplines, offering high cost-performance for related majors.
